title: LLPT Butyl Tape | Roof Sealant | White | UV Stable RV Sealant Repair Tape | Extreme Durable Waterproof Airtight | for Window RV Repair Boat Trailer Motorhome Patching (SV62110WT2) | 51 mm x 15 m
features: MULTI-SURFACE ADHESION: LLPT RV Roof Repair Seal Tape is engineered for superior versatility, bonding effortlessly to a wide range of surfaces. Whether you're working with EPDM, Hypalon, TPO, aluminum, galvanized steel, wood, or fiberglass, this tape ensures a secure and lasting seal. It's ideal for use on metal buildings, trailer roofs, and sides, boats, canoes, drain pans, and more, providing a reliable solution for various repair needs, ensuring the surfaces remain protected and intact.

DURABILITY & UV RESISTANCE: Designed with durability, LLPT industry RV roof tape offers exceptional abrasion and corrosion resistance. It features a UV stable backing that withstands harsh sunlight and fluctuating temperatures, ensuring long lasting protection. This robust tape not only repairs but also creates a protective coating for your surfaces, making it a reliable choice for maintaining the integrity of your RV roof and other outdoor structures.

NO ADDITIONAL SEALING NEEDED: Featuring a TPO backing combined with advanced butyl adhesive without goopy mess, LLPT tape creates a robust waterproof, moisture proof, and airtight barrier that require no additional sealing. It remains flexible down to -70°F, ensuring performance in extreme conditions. This innovative design simplifies the repair process, offering a hassle free application that delivers long lasting protection without extra sealing products.

RELIABLE & EFFICIENT: Boasting a 15-20 year performance guarantee without yellowing, cracking or losing adhesion, LLPT seal tape provides exceptional peace of mind. It creates a strong, watertight bond that stands up to heavy rain and intense sun, preventing leaks and safeguarding your RV interior. With its proven resilience, LLPT tape ensures the RV remains protected from the elements, making it an essential addition to your maintenance toolkit.

EASE OF USE: LLPT RV Roof Repair Seal Tape simplifies the repair tasks with its easy to apply design. No trays or messy solvents are required, and its sticky surface adheres securely without the need for additional adhesives. This straightforward application process saves you time and effort, allowing you to quickly and efficiently address leaks and damage. For best results, ensure the surface is thoroughly dry before application and press the tape firmly.
